title: Who Changed That Status? Get Status Changer Automatically Assigns Them!

posts.author: koko03_30 (Konstantin Botev)
posts.cookedHtml:
Who Changed That Status? Get Status Changer Automatically Assigns Them!

We’re excited to introduce Get Status Changer, a powerful new app designed to fill a key gap in your monday.com workflow!

Have you ever wished that the person who updates a status could automatically be assigned to the relevant task? Now, with Get Status Changer, that’s exactly what happens—seamlessly and automatically.

What Does Get Status Changer Do?

Every time a status changes on an item, Get Status Changer automatically assigns the user who made that change to a designated People column of your choice. This means:
Instant visibility into who’s responsible for each change.
A more efficient and transparent workflow.

Why You’ll Love It: Key Benefits

  • Unlocks a New Automation Capability: This feature isn’t available by default on monday.com—now, you can automate task assignments effortlessly.
  • Perfect for Complex Workflows: Streamline multi-step processes, ensuring the right people are assigned at every stage.
  • Enhanced Reporting: Quickly identify team engagement and track user activity at a glance—perfect for performance reviews or project audits.
  • Boost Accountability: Automatically documenting who made a status change increases ownership and responsibility.
  • Improves Workflow Transparency: Everyone on the team can see who last interacted with each task, keeping collaboration clear and organized.

Ready to Level Up Your monday.com Workflow?

Get started with Get Status Changer today and experience streamlined automation like never before!

Try Get Status Changer Now
